page_metadata.biotools__summary: An automated tool that uses a fragment-based sampling strategy for de novo model completion of macromolecular structures from cryo-EM density maps at 3–5-Å resolution.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: An automated tool that uses a fragment-based sampling strategy for de novo model completion of macromolecular structures from cryo-EM density maps at 3–5-Å resolution.
